channel.title: Made by Human — Blog
channel.description: Essays and updates on human creativity in an AI-saturated world.

item.title: How to Add a 'Made by Human' Badge to Your Next.js or React Website
item.description: A quick technical guide on integrating our responsive, theme-aware SVG badges into modern React and Next.js applications.

item.title: How to Signal Human Creativity in Your Projects
item.description: A guide on showcasing human craftsmanship and intention alongside AI tools, and how badges can build trust.

item.title: Made by Human vs. Not By AI: A Positive Approach to Transparency
item.description: Why we choose to celebrate human creativity and curation instead of defining our work by what it is not.

item.title: The Art of Curation: Keeping the Human Touch in the AI Era
item.description: Why taste, intent, and critical curation are the most important creative skills in a world of abundant synthetic content.

item.title: Why Transparency About AI Use Matters
item.description: In an AI-saturated world, being open about how you create builds trust and honors the human element in work.

item.title: Welcome to the Made by Human blog
item.description: A place to share thinking, updates, and stories from the Made by Human movement.
